# FieldSales (fieldsa.net)

> FieldSales is a SaaS field-sales (DSD / van-sales) management platform for distribution companies in Arab markets. Sales reps issue tax invoices, collect payments, and manage van stock from a mobile app; managers get live dashboards, GPS tracking and reports. Available in Arabic, English and French. Free 10-day trial, no card required.
> منصّة FieldSales نظام سحابي لإدارة المبيعات الميدانية والتوزيع: فواتير ضريبية من الميدان، تحصيل، مخزون سيارة المندوب، تتبّع GPS، وتقارير لحظية.

Key facts:
- Product type: field sales / DSD / van sales management software (SaaS, multi-tenant).
- Core features: field tax invoicing (ZATCA-compliant QR in Saudi Arabia), returns/credit notes, payment collection & receivables, customer statements, van stock, live GPS rep tracking, product catalog & price tiers, team permissions, ERP integration, PDF documents in Arabic.
- Markets: all 22 Arab League countries, with localized guides per country (currency, VAT rate, tax authority).
- Languages: Arabic (RTL), English, French.
- Pricing: free 10-day trial at https://fieldsa.net/signup — no credit card required.
- Rep app runs on any smartphone (PWA + Android); optional thermal printer for field printing.

## Main pages

- [Home (Arabic)](https://fieldsa.net/): product overview, features, pricing and FAQ.
- [Home (English)](https://fieldsa.net/en): English version of the product page.
- [Sign up — free trial](https://fieldsa.net/signup): start a 10-day free trial in minutes.
- [About](https://fieldsa.net/about): who is behind FieldSales.
- [Contact](https://fieldsa.net/contact): sales and support contact.
- [Blog (Arabic)](https://fieldsa.net/blog): guides for distributors in Arab markets.
- [Blog (English)](https://fieldsa.net/en/blog): English guides.

## Guides (pillar articles)

- [What Is Field Sales Management Software?](https://fieldsa.net/en/blog/what-is-field-sales-management): Everything distributors in Arab markets need about what is field sales management software? — with practical steps and local examples.

- [Pricing Tiers Strategy](https://fieldsa.net/en/blog/pricing-tiers-strategy): Everything distributors in Arab markets need about pricing tiers strategy — with practical steps and local examples.
- [Digital Transformation for Distributors](https://fieldsa.net/en/blog/digital-transformation-distribution): Everything distributors in Arab markets need about digital transformation for distributors — with practical steps and local examples.
